ddls:
CREATE TABLE "raid_instances" (
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each raid instance */,
  "instance_name" TEXT /* Name of the raid instance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the raid instance */,
  "difficulty_levels" TEXT /* Difficulty levels available for the raid instance (e.g., Normal, Heroic, Mythic) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for the raid instance */,
  "raid_type" TEXT /* Type of raid (e.g., dungeon, raid, PvP) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "difficulties" (
  "difficulty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each difficulty level */,
  "difficulty_name" TEXT /* Name of the difficulty level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the difficulty level */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for the difficulty level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("difficulty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "spec" TEXT /* Specialization of the class (e.g., healing, tanking, DPS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the raid instance */,
  "difficulty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the difficulty level */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class */,
  "statistic_value" REAL /* Statistic value (e.g., percentage, rating) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_statistics_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES raid_instances ("instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_statistics_difficulty_id FOREIGN KEY ("difficulty_id") REFERENCES difficulties ("difficulty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_statistics_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "raid_compositions" (
  "composition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each composition */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the raid instance */,
  "difficulty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the difficulty level */,
  "composition" TEXT /* Raid composition (e.g., number of tanks, healers, DPS) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for the composition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("composition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "raid_encounter_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the raid instance */,
  "difficulty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the difficulty level */,
  "encounter_name" TEXT /* Name of the encounter */,
  "attempt_number" INTEGER /* Attempt number */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Whether the attempt was successful */,
  "raid_date" TEXT /* Date of the raid encounter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_raid_encounter_logs_difficulty_id FOREIGN KEY ("difficulty_id") REFERENCES difficulties ("difficulty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_raid_encounter_logs_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES raid_instances ("instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class */,
  "player_role" TEXT /* Role of the player in the guild (e.g., leader, officer, member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the raid instance */,
  "difficulty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the difficulty level */,
  "statistic_value" REAL /* Statistic value (e.g., DPS, healing done) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES raid_instances ("instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_difficulty_id FOREIGN KEY ("difficulty_id") REFERENCES difficulties ("difficulty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guilds" (
  "guild_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guild */,
  "guild_name" TEXT /* Name of the guild */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guild_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guild_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "guild_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guild */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role in the guild (e.g., leader, officer, member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_guild_members_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_guild_members_guild_id FOREIGN KEY ("guild_id") REFERENCES guilds ("guild_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "raid_rosters" (
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roster */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the raid instance */,
  "difficulty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the difficulty level */,
  "composition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the composition */,
  "raid_date" TEXT /* Date of the raid */,
  "raid_number" INTEGER /* Number of the raid */,
  "raid_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the raid in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_raid_rosters_difficulty_id FOREIGN KEY ("difficulty_id") REFERENCES difficulties ("difficulty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_raid_rosters_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES raid_instances ("instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_raid_rosters_composition_id FOREIGN KEY ("composition_id") REFERENCES raid_compositions ("composition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "raid_roster_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the roster */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role in the raid (e.g., tank, healer, DPS) */,
  "player_position" TEXT /* Position of the player in the raid (e.g., main tank, off tank, healer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_raid_roster_members_roster_id FOREIGN KEY ("roster_id") REFERENCES raid_rosters ("roster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_raid_roster_members_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_raid_roster_members_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "raid_rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the raid instance */,
  "difficulty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the difficulty level */,
  "reward_name" TEXT /* Name of the reward */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of reward (e.g., item, achievement) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for the reward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_raid_rewards_difficulty_id FOREIGN KEY ("difficulty_id") REFERENCES difficulties ("difficulty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_raid_rewards_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES raid_instances ("instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reward */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "reward_date" TEXT /* Date the reward was received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_rewards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "raid_difficulty_levels" (
  "difficulty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the difficulty level */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the raid instance */,
  "difficulty_name" TEXT /* Name of the difficulty level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("difficulty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_raid_difficulty_levels_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES raid_instances ("instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "raid_bosses" (
  "boss_id" INTEGER /* ID of the boss */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the raid instance */,
  "boss_name" TEXT /* Name of the boss */,
  "health" INTEGER /* Health of the boss */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("boss_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_raid_bosses_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES raid_instances ("instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "raid_boss_kills" (
  "kill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the kill */,
  "boss_id" INTEGER /* ID of the boss */,
  "raid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the raid */,
  "kill_date" TEXT /* Date of the kill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_raid_boss_kills_boss_id FOREIGN KEY ("boss_id") REFERENCES raid_bosses ("boss_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_raid_boss_kills_raid_id FOREIGN KEY ("raid_id") REFERENCES raid_rosters ("roster_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each raid instance
